name: tracking-agent
description: Browser-based tracking validation agent using agent-browser + pi-agent-core

scripts.test:integration: node --import tsx src/integration/run-suite.ts -- vitest run -c vitest.integration.config.ts
scripts.test:integration:llm: node --import tsx src/integration/run-suite.ts -- vitest run -c vitest.integration.config.ts src/integration/agent-assisted.integration.test.ts
scripts.quality:staged: npm run lint && npm run test:coverage && npm run typecheck && node --import tsx src/quality/crap-report.ts --staged --threshold 30
scripts.test:crap: npm run test:coverage && node --import tsx src/quality/crap-report.ts
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run typecheck
scripts.verify:local: npm run verify && env -u AGENT_BROWSER_HEADED npm run test:integration && env -u AGENT_BROWSER_HEADED npm run test:integration:llm
scripts.verify:local:headed: npm run verify && AGENT_BROWSER_HEADED=true npm run test:integration && AGENT_BROWSER_HEADED=true npm run test:integration:llm
